# Copilot Instructions

## Package Manager

This project uses **bun** as the package manager. Always use `bun` commands instead of `npm`, `yarn`, or `pnpm`:

- `bun install` (not `npm install`)
- `bun run dev` (not `npm run dev`)
- `bun run build` (not `npm run build`)
- `bun add <package>` / `bun add -d <package>` (not `npm install`)
